summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held a special meeting to address financing of a fire truck. The board rescinded a previous resolution and adopted a new, more detailed resolution with additional bond language as recommended by a bond attorney after concerns were raised by legal counsel Brian Shrive about the original bond language in the Flagstar master lease agreement. The meeting lasted approximately five minutes.
decisions: Adopted the agenda for the special meeting
Rescinded the previous resolution regarding the fire truck lease financing

Adopted a new resolution authorizing lease obligations not to exceed $1,194,118 under ORC 537D for acquisition and financing of fire equipment via master lease agreement with Flagstar, incorporating additional bond language recommended by bond attorney
action_items: Staff to finalize and process all financing documents this week
Staff to track down the fiscal officer (Lisa) to get her signature on the documents
key_amounts: Not to exceed $1,194,118 for fire truck lease obligation financing
notable_topics: Bond language revisions recommended by bond attorney
Rescinding previous resolution and adopting revised resolution with proper legal language
notes: The transcript contains significant garbled/corrupted text segments, likely due to automated transcription errors. Trustee Laura Smith appears to call the meeting to order but is not called during roll call, suggesting possible confusion in the transcript. The bond attorney (unnamed) reviewed the original resolution and worked with Flagstar to ensure proper legal language was included.
title: BOT Special Meeting 7-10-25
